steps.title: Poly-L- Ornithine Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #A-004-C 0
steps.instruction: Poly-L- Ornithine Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #A-004-C 0.1 mg/mL, Stock concentration 50 µg/µL, Working concentration Thaw an aliquot of Poly-L-Ornithine solution at room temperature.

steps.title: use a 5mL pipette to Triturate...
steps.instruction: use a 5mL pipette to Triturate cells only 1 or 2 times before seeding.

steps.title: Discard the supernatant and resuspend in 1mL LUHMES growth media
steps.instruction: Discard the supernatant and resuspend in 1mL LUHMES growth media

steps.title: Transfer cells to 15mL tube and...
steps.instruction: Transfer cells to 15mL tube and centrifuge for 5 minutes at 1200 RPM

steps.title: Neutralize trypsin with 6mL of pre-warmed DMEM/F12
steps.instruction: Neutralize trypsin with 6mL of pre-warmed DMEM/F12

steps.title: Add 4mL of the pre-warmed
steps.instruction: Add 4mL of the pre-warmed .025% Trypsin/EDTA and place in the incubator for 3 minutes. Trypsin/edta Solution (TE) Thermo Scientific Catalog #R001100

steps.title: Remove media and rinse with DPBS
steps.instruction: Remove media and rinse with DPBS

steps.title: DMEM/F12 Thermo Fisher Scientific Catalog #11320033...
steps.instruction: DMEM/F12 Thermo Fisher Scientific Catalog #11320033 Penicillin Streptomycin (10,000 U/mL) Gibco - Thermo Fisher Scientific Catalog #15140122 B-27 Supplement (50X) Thermo Fisher Scientific Catalog #17504044 Recombinant Human FGF basic/FGF2/bFGF (145 aa) Protein, CF R&D Systems Catalog #3718-FB Add recombinant human FGF to media after seeding cells **See material section for media concentration information**

steps.title: Fibronectin human plasma,liquid, 0
steps.instruction: Fibronectin human plasma,liquid, 0.1% (Solution), Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #F0895-1MG Storage: –20 °C in aliquots 1 mg/mL, Stock Concentration 2 µg/µL, Working concentration Thaw an aliquot of Fibronectin solution at 5°C . Do not vortex or shake vigorously to resuspend the fibronectin. This will cause the fibronectin to “crash” out of solution, which is irreversible

steps.title: Change (pre-warmed) media every 1-2 days...
steps.instruction: Change (pre-warmed) media every 1-2 days LUHMES are sensitive to changes in the media pH and oxidative stress. Always use fresh DMEM/F12 because the HEPES buffer in DMEM is subject to photooxidation upon exposure to light and produces hydrogen peroxide.

steps.title: Dilute the Fibronectin in sterile Hank’s Balanced Salt Solution (HBSS)
steps.instruction: Dilute the Fibronectin in sterile Hank’s Balanced Salt Solution (HBSS). Add 2 µL, Fibronectin to 998 µL, HBSS

steps.title: Rinse 3 times with HBSS
steps.instruction: Rinse 3 times with HBSS.

steps.title: Air dry for 15 minutes and...
steps.instruction: Air dry for 15 minutes and add fresh LUHMES growth media.

steps.title: Dilute Poly-L-Ornithine solution to 50ug/mL in...
steps.instruction: Dilute Poly-L-Ornithine solution to 50ug/mL in Nuclease-free water Add 500 µL of PLO for every 500 µL Nuclease-free water

steps.title: Add 7mL of the 50ug/mL PLO...
steps.instruction: Add 7mL of the 50ug/mL PLO to a T-75 overnight at RT.

steps.title: Rinse flask 3 times with Nuclease-free water
steps.instruction: Rinse flask 3 times with Nuclease-free water.

steps.title: Allow the flask to air dry...
steps.instruction: Allow the flask to air dry for 15 minutes uncapped and standing upright in the hood. (turn on UV)

steps.title: Label 2mL cryovials with the date,...
steps.instruction: Label 2mL cryovials with the date, name, FIV#, Qbench number, passage number and cell type. Add about 1.5 million cells per vial with 1mL freezing media. Freezing Media: 7mL LUHMES Media 4uL B-fgf (40ng) 2mL FBS (20%) 1mL DMSO (1%)

steps.title: Add fresh culture media to newly...
steps.instruction: Add fresh culture media to newly coated flask for at least 15 minutes before seeding cells toallow media to reach normal pH

steps.title: Place fibronectin coated flask in incubator for 3 hours
steps.instruction: Place fibronectin coated flask in incubator for 3 hours

steps.title: Day 0, when the LUHMES are...
steps.instruction: Day 0, when the LUHMES are 80% confluent, add differentiation media and incubate overnight.

steps.title: Day 1, replate cells onto a...
steps.instruction: Day 1, replate cells onto a new poly-l-ornithine and fibronectin-coated plate. Replate cells at a density of 1 million cells per T-75 flask or ~ 400,000 per well of a 6-well.

steps.title: Replace LUHMES differentiation media every day while differentiating
steps.instruction: Replace LUHMES differentiation media every day while differentiating. LUHMES become mature dopamine-like neuron in 7-days. LUHMES Differentiation Timeline **See material section for media concentration information**
